name: Collective Imagination for Local Possible Futures
description: The intention of our group is to practice our collective "superpowers" eroded by our modern culture: imagination, dialogue and collaboration. Our objective is to create communities of practice in the bio region of Xalapa, Coatepec and Xico, in the center of Mexico. At the same time, while practicing, we intend to collaborate with several collectives in the region to amplify our imaginaries, and our "feel-thinks", together, to allow new future possibilities to emerge in our bioregion. We acknowledge that systems change at an individual level, the smallest part of a human system, so every heart-mind changed counts. I designed a "ToolBackpack" that aims to help communities in the journey to Eco we are inviting them to. Our main reflection at the present moment is that our modern culture demands an "inner pilgrimage", not between places, but between ways of seeing, being and doing. The tool's intention is to serve us as a guide for our inner transitions, this is done in local communities of practice. For more information you can check our webpage: www.imaginacioncolectiva.org, the toolkit can be downloaded in the Ego - Eco section. For more context about the Journey from Ego to Eco, watch the video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3WJyghX8_gY. To contact me: urbieta@proton.me

name: Federación de Cajas Populares ALIANZA SC de RL de CV
description: ALIANZA is a federation with more than 30 years in service, representing 19 Savings and Loan Cooperatives with 234 service offices. More than 537,000 members in the States of Guanajuato, Michoacán, Jalisco, Querétaro, San Luis Potosí, Aguascalientes, Edo. from Mexico, Hidalgo, Zacatecas and Morelos, in addition to more than 2000 employees and 180 volunteer managers. ALIANZA is a federation that Promotes and Integrates Savings and Credit Cooperatives, Granting Specialized Quality Services; based on Cooperative Philosophy and Healthy Financial Practices, which contribute to its Integral Development. They provide the following services: Represent the Affiliated Entities. Offer specialized advice. Promote economies of scale. Advice on the design, implementation and monitoring of internal control. Develop innovative products and services. Exercise auxiliary supervision under the terms of the Law and Popular Savings and Credit Technical assistance Normative and Regulated Regulations Institutional System Dolphin Alliance System Information technology Marketing Training System ALLIANCE Strategic alliances Relationship with international organizations
